items.meaning: I'm going to apply for a _____________ to attend an English language summer course abroad. (school)
You are very _____________ . You should be an artist! (create)
I don't like these flowers because they look _____________. (nature)
He does not agree with the _____________ that there is life on other planets. (believe)
I think these poems should be _____________ . (memory)
Several hundred people demonstrated _____________ outside the Embassy last Sunday. (peace)
Living in a big city is _____________ because there is too much pollution. (health)
Like paper, many other _____________ can be recycled. (produce)
The use of light and dark _____________ good and evil. (symbol)
He felt a great _____________ to tell her everything. (compel)
Many chemicals have _____________ affected the environment. (disaster)
Why don't we have a computer _____________ in the lab room? (install)
She travels to different parts of the world as part of her job in that _____________ company. (natio
Lots of _____________ activities have recently been held in our city. (culture)
It was such _____________ news that they all sat there saying nothing. (worry)
Bahasa Malaysia is known _____________ as Malay. (simple)
What _____________ did you take part in at school? (act)
She was surprised to find her name on the list of _____________. (nominate)
Traditional _____________ are a good source of fun and entertainment. (celebrate)
You shouldn't read that kind of newspaper. It's _____________. (inform)
The eruption of Mouth Pinatube is the world's _____________ volcanic eruption. (large)
The consumers want products that will work _____________ and save money. (effect)
